case_title: LEADERS IN COMMUNITY ALTERNATIVES, INC. VS. G4S JUSTICE SERVICES, INC. et al

docket_entries.description: NOTICE TO PLAINTIFF
REPLY TO PLTF'S OPPOS TO APPLICATION OF TERRY P. FINNERTY FOR ADMISSION PRO HAC VICE FILED BY DEFENDANT G4S JUSTICE SERVICES, INC.

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT G4S JUSTICE SERVICES, INC. DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEMURRER OVERRULED AS TO B&P 17200 CLAIMS. DEMURRER SUSTAINED WITH TEN DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO NEGLIGENCE TO ALLEGE A CLEAR DUTY BETWEEN TWO COMPETING BUSINESSES, AND AS TO INTENTIONAL MISREPRESENTATION TO CLARIFY A MISREPRESENTATION TO PLAINTIFF. CORPORATE STATUS HAS BEEN REVIVED AND PLEADINGS ARE PROPERLY BEFORE THE COURT. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: MARIA VISCIO, CSR #12353
MINI-MINUTES FOR OCT-06-2009 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 302
ORDER SUSTAINING IN PART AND OVERRULING IN PART DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER TO PLAINTIFF'S FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF DEC-04-2009 CONTINUED TO JAN-15-2010 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 212. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI-MINUTES FOR DEC-28-2009 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 302
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF FEB-26-2010 CONTINUED TO APR-09-2010 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 212. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT G4S JUSTICE SERVICES, LLC DEMURRER TO PLAINTIFF'S THIRD AMENDED COMPLAINT. NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEMURRER SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO THE 3RD, 4TH AND 6TH CAUSES OF ACTION. THE PARTIES RELATIONSHIP WAS SOLELY BUSINESS COMPETITORS. DEFENDANT OWED NO DUTY TO PLAINTIFF TO SUPPORT THE NEGLIGENT-BASED CLAIMS. NO REASONABLE PROBABILITY THAT DEFECT CAN BE CURED BY AMENDMENT. THE INTENTIONAL MISREPRESENTATION CLAIM (5TH CAUSE OF ACTION) IS STRICKEN WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND, AS IT WAS SUBJECT TO DEMURRER IN THE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT, WAS OMITTED IN THE SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT, AND RE-RAISED UNTIMELY IN THE THIRD AMENDED COMPLAINT. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797

Notice Of Hearing Of Demurrer And Demurrer To Pltf'S Third Amended Complaint; Memorandum Of P/A; Request For Judicial Notice In Support Of Demurrer To Pltf'S Third Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Apr-12-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT G4S JUSTICE SERVICES, LLC Demurrer to Plaintiff's Third Amended Complaint. No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Demurrer sustained without leave to amend as to the 3rd, 4th and 6th causes of action. The parties relationship was solely business competitors. Defendant owed no duty to plaintiff to support the negligent-based claims. No reasonable probability that defect can be cured by amendment. The intentional misrepresentation claim (5th cause of action) is stricken without leave to amend, as it was subject to demurrer in the first amended complaint, was omitted in the second amended complaint, and re-raised untimely in the third amended complaint. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) (302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797
